# factor-factory

> A domain-agnostic factor-model + analysis-pipeline framework with first-class jellycell integration, a Protocol-based pluggable engine pattern, and first-class implementations of two methods the Python ecosystem was missing entirely:

## Docs

- [factor-factory](/_sources/index.md.txt)
- [Getting started with factor-factory](/_sources/getting-started.md.txt)
- [Supported domains + extension patterns](/_sources/supported-domains.md.txt)
- [Design contracts](/_sources/design-contracts.md.txt)
- [Jellycell integration](/_sources/jellycell-integration.md.txt)
- [DiD — Two-way fixed effects](/_sources/cookbook/did-twfe.md.txt)
- [DiD — Callaway-Sant’Anna](/_sources/cookbook/did-callaway-santanna.md.txt)
- [Event study — market-adjusted returns](/_sources/cookbook/event-study-market-adjusted.md.txt)
- [Four-way mediation decomposition](/_sources/cookbook/mediation-four-way.md.txt)
- [Regression Discontinuity](/_sources/cookbook/rdd.md.txt)
- [Synthetic Control Method](/_sources/cookbook/scm.md.txt)
- [Synthetic Difference-in-Differences (SDID)](/_sources/cookbook/sdid.md.txt)
- [Survival — Cox proportional hazards](/_sources/cookbook/survival-cox.md.txt)
- [Survival — Kaplan-Meier](/_sources/cookbook/survival-km.md.txt)

- [Architecture](/_sources/reference/architecture.md.txt)
